yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Hackers_Actively_Exploiting_Critical_Web {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Hackers Actively Exploiting Critical WebLogic RCE Vulnerabilities in Attacks"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-05"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "WebLogic" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 1949 threat advisories. Of these, 13 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 49 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include multiple unattributed groups. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Proactive identification of undetected compromise indicators
